# Golden filename fixtures for offset-based naming scheme.
# Format: <consumerID> <seqStart> <seqEnd> <expected>
# Lines starting with '#' are comments. Blank lines ignored.

gcs-archiver 1000 1063 gcs-archiver-1000-1063.ndjson
gcs-archiver 1 1 gcs-archiver-1-1.ndjson
gcs-archiver 0 0 gcs-archiver-0-0.ndjson
gcs-archiver 9999999 10000000 gcs-archiver-9999999-10000000.ndjson
gcs-archiver 1 64 gcs-archiver-1-64.ndjson
my-consumer 500 563 my-consumer-500-563.ndjson
